title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Zebronics

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Zebronics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zebronics! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zebronics:
Zebronics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zebronics!
